title: Atlas Lib
description: A library for shared code between minecraft mods.
body:
A library for shared code between Minecraft mods.

 

This mod does nothing if installed by itself, and only exists as a dependency for other mods

 

Features Included for dependents:

Various utilities to streamline the registering of sets of items and blocks.
Various utilities to handle the rendering of models.
Various utilities related to entity and block positioning.
Utilities to read json from datapacks.
Utilities to read values from NBT.
Other shared code between mods.
